expectations.text: Names a specific reference file by name — common_mistakes.md or datajoint_api.md
expectations.evidence: Names common_mistakes.md as primary and datajoint_api.md as follow-up.

expectations.text: Explains the choice in one line
expectations.evidence: 'cardinality footgun ... 47 means your restriction matched 47 rows but fetch1() demands exactly one — so the diagnostic and fix are mechanical, not mysterious, and common_mistakes.md points straight at them'.
